nodes.name: On CRM Cold Lead Drop
nodes.notes: Trigger: receives a cold or failed lead event from the CRM. Objective: start the AI lead-revival helper flow.

string.name: dropoutReason
string.value: ={{ $json.body?.dropout_notes || $json.dropout_notes || 'Lead delayed because pricing felt high for now.' }}

nodes.name: Parse Lead Data
nodes.notes: Function: standardizes lead fields from the incoming webhook payload so downstream nodes always receive clean data like name, phone, budget, micromarket, and dropout notes.

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ { contents: [ { role: 'user', parts: [ { text: 'You are Anarock Astra Phoenix AI helper for reviving cold real-estate leads. Analyse the dropout notes and return ONLY valid JSON with keys dropout_category, revival_strategy, whatsapp_draft. Allowed dropout_category values: Price, Location, Timing. Keep the WhatsApp draft under 220 characters if possible. Lead Name: ' + $json.leadName + '. Budget: ' + $json.budget + '. Micromarket: ' + $json.microMarket + '. Dropout Notes: ' + $json.dropoutReason } ] } ], generationConfig: { temperature: 0.3, responseMimeType: 'application/json' } } }}

nodes.name: Gemini via HTTP
nodes.notes: Function: calls Gemini directly through HTTP Request, avoiding the native Gemini/LangChain node dependency. Requires GEMINI_API_KEY as an environment variable.

nodes.name: Normalize Gemini Output
nodes.notes: Function: safely parses Gemini API output into reusable JSON fields for routing and final response.

nodes.name: Route by Drop-out Reason
nodes.notes: Function: routes the lead into one of three business scenarios — price, location, or timing — so the right comeback angle can be applied.

nodes.name: Draft Price Mitigation
nodes.notes: Function: maps price-sensitive leads to a finance-led revival offer.

nodes.name: Draft Location Alternative
nodes.notes: Function: maps location-mismatch leads to an alternative project or connectivity-led pitch.

nodes.name: Schedule 90-Day Nudge
nodes.notes: Function: maps timing-delayed leads to a future re-engagement nudge.

string.name: status
string.value: Draft prepared for demo via HTTP Gemini call

nodes.name: Prepare Demo Output
nodes.notes: Function: packages the selected offer type and AI-generated message into a demo-safe output instead of calling a live WhatsApp API.

parameters.responseBody: ={{ { success: true, objective: 'Classify cold leads and generate a personalized revival message', end_output: 'Structured JSON with category, strategy, offer type, and WhatsApp draft', aiEngine: 'Gemini via HTTP Request', leadName: $json.leadName, leadPhone: $json.leadPhone, budget: $json.budget, microMarket: $json.microMarket, dropout_category: $json.dropout_category, revival_strategy: $json.revival_strategy, offerType: $json.offerType, whatsapp_draft: $json.revivalMessage, status: $json.status, demoMode: $json.demoMode } }}

nodes.name: Return Demo Response
nodes.notes: End output: returns a structured JSON payload that proves the PoC outcome without requiring a live downstream messaging integration.

body.dropout_notes: Lead is traveling abroad for 3 months on an onsite assignment. Asked not to be called until they return next quarter.
